one_time_description: Irrevocable contribution to Coast Funds endowment fund
economic_notes: First Nation holds interests in multiple Nanwakolas limited partnerships (carbon credits, forestry, offset, timber), Nanwakolas Business Corporation, Gwabalis Fisheries Society, and wholly-owned Mamalilikulla Economic Development Corporation and LP. COVID-19 noted as significant event with uncertain impact.
notes: Prior period restatement (Note 3) to include Gwabalis Fisheries LP and Society equity, increasing opening accumulated surplus by $1,254,016. Fiscal year is 2021, not 2024. Social Housing consolidated as subsidiary; 8 entities accounted for under modified equity method. No schedule of remuneration provided. $500,000 irrevocable endowment contribution to Coast Funds is a significant one-time item. total_government_transfers includes ISC $839,721 + Province of BC $460,815 + First Nation Health Authority $114,765 + CMHC $554 = $1,415,855. Land acquisition of $2,849,422 included in capital asset additions.
